translation_notes: Interpreted breakout entry as close above Donchian upper band with volume confirmation. Exit conditions use support level (S1 pivot) breach and risk-based stops. The source text is incomplete ('fairly tight s') and lacks specific numeric thresholds. A complete implementation would require: (1) definition of 'established resistance' via lookback period, (2) pullback retracement limit as percentage, (3) ATR multiple for stop placement, (4) volume threshold definition. Direction set to LONG based on 'breakout' framing; CONTEXT_DEPENDENT would require separate SHORT rules.
